title: Pappa Bom
writer: Paul Baudisch, Adolf Schütz, Nils Poppe
actors: Nils Poppe, Gunnar Björnstrand, Else-Merete Heiberg
plot: One-day auctioneer Fabian Bom finds a little child in a cradle that is about to be called out. He leaves for the orphanage, but there they don't want to take the boy. Bom thinks about adoption but that requires some qualifications...
